sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76818" key="paleonumfa/gonos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πᾰλεο-νυμφάγονος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φᾱ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n76818.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">where nymphs were born of old</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἄντρον</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0376.tlg001:120" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">120</biblScope> </bibl> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-φαιο</foreign>- Pap.).</sense> </entryFree>
